name: LlamaCloud MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official LlamaCloud MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with LlamaCloud's managed RAG pipeline — indexing documents, querying knowledge bases, managing pipelines, and accessing LlamaIndex's enterprise document processing platform.
use_cases: Querying enterprise knowledge bases from information retrieval agents
Indexing and processing documents from document management agents
Building and managing RAG pipelines from platform engineering agents
Searching across multiple knowledge sources from research agents
Monitoring pipeline performance and indexing status from ops agents
Integrating managed RAG with agentic workflows
not_for: Teams using self-hosted LlamaIndex OSS without LlamaCloud
Teams using Pinecone, Weaviate, or raw vector DBs directly
best_when: An agent needs managed RAG pipelines with enterprise document processing — especially for complex document types (PDFs, Word, tables) at scale.
avoid_when: You're using self-hosted LlamaIndex or a different RAG platform.

auth.notes: LlamaCloud API key at organization level. No scope granularity — full org access.

pricing.notes: Usage-based on document pages processed. Free tier for development. MCP server is open source.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits not prominently documented

known_agent_gotchas: Pipeline ID and index ID required for most queries
Document ingestion is async — agents must poll for pipeline completion
Page-based pricing — agents should be aware of document size costs
LlamaCloud vs OSS LlamaIndex have different APIs
API key lacks scope granularity — full org access
Knowledge base retrieval quality depends on parsing quality at ingestion
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key lacks scopes. SOC 2. US-only data residency currently.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key lacks scopes. SOC 2. US-only currently.
